title: croton ericius
intro: Croton ericius, also known as Croton lechleri, is a tropical plant species native to the Amazon rainforest, belonging to the Euphorbiaceae family. The plant's stem bark has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, making it useful in treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Croton ericius include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and support the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant's stem bark is often extracted and used as a tincture or cream, applied topically to soothe skin irritations and promote healing.
